@import url("rinvoq-global.css");:root{--spc1:8px;--spc2:14px;--spc3:28px;--spc4:56px;--spc5:64px;--desktop-header-padding:16px 70px;--desktop-padding:var(--spc4) var(--spc5) var(--spc2);--mobile-padding:40px 31px;--transcript-height:242px}
a.underlined-bolded{text-decoration:underline;font-family:var(--font-helveticaRoman);letter-spacing:.021rem}
a.underlined-bolded:hover{font-family:var(--font-helveticaBold);letter-spacing:0}

.inline-block-elements>*{display:inline-block}
.abbv-rich-text.vertical-align-bottom>*{vertical-align:bottom;margin:0}
.image-auto-size img{width:auto;height:auto;max-height:100%;max-width:100%}
.brush--as-content img{position:relative;right:-4px;top:20px}
.dark-background{color:#fff}
.dark-background a,.dark-background .abbv-button-plain{color:#ffd100}
.dark-background.plum-background a,.dark-background.plum-background .abbv-button-plain{color:#fff;text-decoration:underline;font-family:"Helvetica Neue LT W05_75 Bold",Arial,Helvetica Neue,Helvetica,sans-serif,'abbv-iconFont'}
ul.list-arrows{list-style-image:url("/content/dam/rinvoq/images/common/list-icon.png")}
.abbv-quick-poll{border:0;padding:0}
.ia-area{width:auto}
.cta-container .cta,.cta-container .abbv-rich-text,.cta-container .abbv-button-plain,.cta-container p{display:inline;padding:0}
.video-transcript .abbv-accordion-blade-text::after,.abbv-button-plain::after{display:inline-block;content:"\e315";font-family:"Helvetica Neue LT W05_75 Bold",Aria

/* DOCUMENT INFORMATION
	- Document: Show terms and conditions title and hide dagger
	- Version:  1.0
*/

#abbv-psa-footer+.abbv-footer .abbv-legal-text,
#abbv-psa-footer+.abbv-footer .abbv-legal-text .psa-footnote-header {
	display: block;
}
#abbv-psa-footer+.abbv-footer .abbv-legal-text .dagger-tc-sup {
	display: none;
}

.abbv-button-plain.link, .abbv-button-plain.link:visited
font-family: "Graphik Medium","Helvetica Neue",arial,helvetica,sans-serif; font-style: normal; color: var(--plum); line-height: 1.2; text-decoration: underline;
.abbv-button-plain.link:focus-visible, .abbv-button-plain.link:visited:focus-visible
box-shadow: 0 0 5px 5px var(--plum); outline: 1px solid var(--whisper);
.abbv-button-plain.link.reverse, .abbv-button-plain.link:visited.reverse
color: var(--white);

@import url(rinvoqhcp.css);@import url(rinvoqhcp-utility-global.css);.page-header--outlaw span:not(.stroke--text),.page-header--outlaw_with-footnote-image span:not(.stroke--text){letter-spacing:-8px}
.page-header--outlaw .stroke--text{position:relative;font-size:1.563rem}
.container_hero-cd-home .page-header--outlaw p.stroke--text{width:max-content}
.container_hero-cd-home .page-header--outlaw p.stroke--text::after{position:absolute;z-index:-1;display:block;content:" ";background-image:url(/content/dam/rinvoqhcpivy/images/brushstrokes/underline-stroke-r12-allviews.png) !important;background-position:center;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:100% auto;top:35px;height:10px;width:100%}
.section-header,.brush-scale-card .section-header--wide,.section-header__margin-top{background-image:url("/content/dam/rinvoqhcpivy/images//brushstrokes/stroke--heading-back.svg") !important}
.safety-considerations-brush-title .section-header{background-position:40%;background-size:80% 100%}
.uc-grid .rich-text:has(h3+p){margin-bottom:5px}
.underline--text::after,.brush-card--side-by-side h3::after,.emphasised--number::after,.underline--black::after,.underline--text-thick::after{background:url("/content/dam/rinvoqhcpivy/images/brushstrokes/stroke--underline.svg") !important;background-size:100% 100% !important}
.uc-grid .underline--text{margin-bottom:11px}
.text--white{color:var(--white)}

@charset "UTF-8"; @import url(https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/content/dam/global/css/brand-explorer-v2.css); 

.section-header-brush, .brush-scale-card .section-header--med, .section-header__margin-top {
    width: auto;
    padding-left: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
    margin-left: -32px;
    background-image: url("/content/dam/remotedam/approved-assets/rinvoq/hcp/graphics/stroke-heading-back-switch1.png");
    background-position: center;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: contain;
    background-size: 97% 100%;
    background-position-x: 10px;
    color: rgb(37 40 42 / 100%);
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-align: left;  

    padding-right: 5px;
    margin-right: -5px;
}

.section-header-no-brush, .brush-scale-card .section-header--med, .section-header__margin-top {
    width: auto;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
    color: rgb(37 40 42 / 100%);
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-align: left;
}

.section-header-brush-h2, .brush-scale-card .section-header--med, .section-header__margin-top {
    width: auto;

.gca-access{gap:0}
.gca-access .titles h3 span{font-size:1rem}
.gca-access .titles h4{padding:24px;background:var(--glacier);color:var(--charcoal);font-size:1.25em}
.gca-access .titles h4 span{font-size:inherit;margin-left:0}
.gca-access hr{border-color:var(--silver)}
.gca-access .rich-text:has(h3)+.flexbox-v2{margin-top:unset}
.gca-access .box--callout{padding:12px;background-color:var(--ash);border-radius:10px;color:var(--charcoal)}
.gca-access .flexboxitem-v2:first-child{max-width:270px}

}

/* DOCUMENT INFORMATION
	- Document: Skyrizi complete styles
	- Version:  1.0
*/

/* to enable once the node is fixed*/
@import url(../css/skyrizi.css);

/* Fonts */
@font-face {
	font-family: "Helvetica Neue LT W05_75 Bold";
	src: url("/content/dam/skyriziivy/fonts/4c21ab66-1566-4a85-b310-fbc649985f88.eot?#iefix");
	src: url("/content/dam/skyriziivy/fonts/4c21ab66-1566-4a85-b310-fbc649985f88.eot?#iefix") format("eot"), url("/content/dam/skyriziivy/fonts/800da3b0-675f-465f-892d-d76cecbdd5b1.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/content/dam/skyriziivy/fonts/7b415a05-784a-4a4c-8c94-67e9288312f5.woff") format("woff"), url("/content/dam/skyriziivy/fonts/f07c25ed-2d61-4e44-99ab-a0bc3ec67662.ttf") format("truetype")
}

.margin-overlap-mobile-top-100 {
	margin-top: -100px;
}

.margin-overlap-mobile-right-15 {
	margin-right: -15px;
}

.margin-overlap-mobile-bottom-40 {
	margin-bottom: -40px;
}

.abbv-flex-container.mobile-hidden {
	display: none;
}

/* GENERIC STYLES */
.abbv-linear-gray-transparent-gradient {
	background-image: linear-gradient( to bottom, #F6FBFF, transparent 320px) !important;
}
.abbv-linear-blue-gray-transparent-gradient {
	background-image: linear-gradient( to bottom, #EBF6FC, transparent 335px) !important;
}

.abbv-linear-blue-gray-transparent-gradient-large {
	background-image: linear-gradient( to bottom, #EBF6FC, transparent 1200px) !important;
}
.linear-blue-transparenr-gradient {
	background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, #F3FAFE 12%, #FFFFFF 92%);
}

.abbv-backgro

.sr-only {
	position: absolute;
	overflow: hidden;
	width: 1px;
	height: 1px;
	padding: 0;
	border: 0;
	margin: -1px;

	clip-path: inset(50%);

min-height: unset;

min-height: 154px; padding-bottom: 12px;
.abbv-background-container-content > div
display: grid; grid-template-areas: "text image"; grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-gap: 18px;

padding-bottom: 0; padding-top: 0;

color: #071d49; font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 2.7vw, 1.25rem); line-height: 1.2; padding-top: 0;

margin-right: 32px;

margin: 150px auto 0; max-width: 90%;

:root{--color-white:#fff;--color-skyrizi-blue:#00a3df;--color-skyrizi-black:#50535a}
.psoriasis-background-container{height:410px}
.psoriasis-text-bold{font-weight:bolder !important;font-size:2rem !important;font-family:'Univers LT W01_57 Condensed' !important}
.psoriasis-background-container .abbv-background-container-image-bg{background-image:url(/content/dam/skyrizi/es-pr/images/home/psoriasis/HeroImage-Psoriasis-mobile.png) !important;height:560px}
.psoriasis-background-container .abbv-image-swap{top:200px;text-align:center}
.psoriasis-background-container .abbv-image-swap img{width:336px;height:156px}
.psoriasis-background-container .abbv-rich-text-common{position:absolute;top:115px;font-size:15px;text-align:center;width:100%}
.psoriasis-background-container .abbv-rich-text-common p{color:var(--color-white);font-family:"Univers LT W01_67 Bold_1476016",Roboto,Helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"abbv-iconFont";margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;width:80%}
.psoriasis-cards{max-width:none}
.psoriasis-cards .psoriasis-nowrap-anchor a{white-space:nowrap}
.abbv-title h2{color:var(--color-skyrizi-blue);font-family:"Univers LT W01_67 Bold_1476016",Roboto,Helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"abbv-iconFont";font-size:2.4rem;letter-spacing:-0.58px}
.abbv-title h3{color:var(--color-skyrizi-black);font-family:"Univers LT W01_57 Condensed",Roboto,Helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"abbv-iconFont";font-size:1.8rem;letter-spacing:-0.36px}

CSS Preview (first 1.5KB)
:root{--color-crohn-blue:#00a3df;--color-white:#fff;--text-bold:"Univers LT W01_67 Bold_1476016",Roboto,Helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"abbv-iconFont"}
.efectos-secundarios-heading-color{color:var(--color-white);position:relative;top:160px;text-align:center}
.efectos-secundarios-title-color h2{color:var(--color-crohn-blue);font-family:var(--text-bold)}
.efectos-secundarios-bullets-color li::marker{color:var(--color-crohn-blue)}
.efectos-secundarios-title-subheading-color b{color:var(--color-crohn-blue)}
@media(min-width:961px) and (max-width:1200px){.abbv-header-content-container .efectos-secundarios-logo{position:relative;left:140px}
.efectos-secundarios-heading-color h2{color:var(--color-white);position:relative;top:10px;left:-24%;max-width:960px}
.efectos-secundarios-title-color h2{color:var(--color-crohn-blue);font-family:var(--text-bold);max-width:960px;margin:auto}
.abbv-flex-container .efectos-secundarios-section-top{margin:auto;max-width:960px}
.abbv-inline-use-isi .efectos-secundarios-section-bottom{margin:auto !important;max-width:960px}
}
@media(min-width:1200px){.abbv-header-content-container .efectos-secundarios-logo{position:absolute;left:24%;max-width:1180px}
.efectos-secundarios-title-color h2{color:var(--color-crohn-blue);font-family:var(--text-bold);max-width:1180px;margin:auto}
.efectos-secundarios-heading-color h2{color:var(--color-white);position:relative;top:10px;left:-24%;max-width:1180px}
.abbv-flex-container .efectos-secundarios-section-top
